issues.description: First action should be 'AttachDon' (place 1 Stage/Don with cost 1 at bottom of deck), not 'TrashFromHand'. The effect places a card, not discards from hand.
Filter must specify cost constraint (cost: 1) to match 'Stage with a cost of 1'.

Second effect with 'Trigger' and 'TurnCount' is incorrect. This is an Activated ability (manual activation), not a triggered effect. The 'Once Per Turn' restriction should be encoded in the trigger itself or as a constraint, not as a separate Trigger effect.
KO target should use 'maxCost' constraint, but the scope 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' needs verification that it properly applies the cost filter of 2 or less.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] You may place 1 Stage with a cost of 1 at the bottom of the owner's deck: K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 2 or less.
